purpose: Prospectively validate the frozen Train-696 marginal pair-synergy receptor subset on previously unused rows from the locked MAPK14 validation partition.

data_boundary.previous_validation_panel: consumed_diagnostic_only; every represented split_group_id is excluded from the fresh panel
data_boundary.development_train: may be read only to freeze score-normalization bounds and previously selected methods
data_boundary.test: locked_unreleased; no test row may enter a manifest, docking job, metric, or report
prohibited_actions: reuse a row or split_group_id represented in the consumed 40-active/40-decoy validation panel
change the fresh-panel selection seed or decoy ratio after identities are materialized
change receptor subsets, score aggregation, normalization, metrics, bootstrap, or thresholds after validation docking begins
fit any QUBO coefficient or receptor subset on fresh-validation labels or scores
read or dock the locked test partition

fresh_panel_selection.active_rule: After consumed-group exclusion, include every remaining validation split group containing at least one active and include every row in each such group.
fresh_panel_selection.decoy_rule: Rank remaining validation decoy-only split groups by SHA-256 of selection_seed plus split_group_id and include whole groups until total decoys are at least target_decoy_to_active_ratio times the selected active count.

ligand_preparation.rdkit_embedding: ETKDGv3 with explicit hydrogens and useRandomCoords=true
ligand_preparation.optimization: MMFF94 when parameters are available, otherwise UFF; maximum 500 iterations; retain non-convergence warnings
ligand_preparation.pdbqt: Meeko 0.7.1; include warning SDF rows; every selected ligand must finish with pdbqt_status=ok before bundling

frozen_methods.score_direction: lower normalized docking score ranks earlier
frozen_methods.normalization: For primary, sensitivity, seed0, seed1, and seed2 separately, fit per-receptor min and max on the complete hashed Train-696 matrix only; apply unchanged bounds to fresh validation; do not clip out-of-range validation values.
frozen_methods.greedy_interpretation: The final greedy and QUBO subsets are identical, so their fixed validation predictions must be identical and cannot support a QUBO-over-greedy claim.

docking.primary_seed_aggregation: median representative score across three paired seeds
docking.sensitivity_seed_aggregation: minimum representative score across three paired seeds

evaluation.seed_robustness: report primary median matrix plus seed0, seed1, seed2, their mean BEDROC, and their worst BEDROC

paired_bootstrap.interval: two-sided percentile interval of paired BEDROC deltas
paired_bootstrap.resamples_without_both_labels: discard and deterministically continue until 5000 valid replicates

next_gate: Materialize the panel and frozen train-only normalization artifact, prepare every selected ligand, build the deterministic CPU bundle, run three e32 seeds, aggregate without score replacement, then evaluate exactly once. Test remains locked even after a pass until a separate authorization is committed.
interpretation_boundary: A pass would provide fresh within-target validation of the frozen receptor subset against matched linear, exhaustive, and single-best comparators. Because QUBO and final greedy select the same subset, it cannot prove QUBO-over-greedy or quantum advantage. It does not establish binding affinity, biological activity, full-DUD-E performance, cross-target generalization, or test performance.
